description.value: Create a passage at close range up to 5 feet wide, 8 feet tall, and 20 feet deep through wood, plaster, or stone. When weave ends, creatures still in passage are ejected safely.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = fails
- 1 = 10 ft (1 round)
- 2 = 20 ft (1 minute)
- 3 = 30 ft (10 minutes)
system.weavingRoll: Earth Potential + Earth Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
